title: reports user gets 'Permission denied' on its own files
description_md:
The `reports` account can no longer read or write its own data in `/home/reports/data` -- straight `Permission denied`, even though nothing about the files looks obviously wrong at first glance. The account was recently recreated by a provisioning tool. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), work out what actually changed, and get `reports` able to use its own files again.

You're done when the `reports` user can read and write `/home/reports/data/report.csv`.
